title: Electronic%20Cargo%20Tracking%20System%20for%20Tanzania%20Revenue%20Authority%20(TRA)
content:
ISO 9001:2008 Certified  
Sokoine Drive,  P. O. Box 11491 Dar es Salaam Tanzania  
Tel. +255 22 2119591/4 Fax. +255 22 2126908/2128594  Email. info@tra.go.tz  
 
 
TANZANIA REVENUE AUTHORITY  
 
TRA/ICTD/C.1/002        02 April , 2013  
 
TO WHO EVER IT MAY CONCERN  
 
Re: ELECTRONIC CARGO TRACKING SYSTEM IMPLEMENTATION FOR  
TANZANIA REVENUE AUTHORITY  (TRA)  
 
This letter is to certify that Techno Brain Ltd (TBL) has successfully implemented 
Electronic Cargo Tracking System for Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) during the 
financial year 2011/ 12 as part of the TRA’s Modernization program. The Electronic 
Cargo Tracking System (ECTS) has bee n operational since March, 2012 and it is a  non-
intrusive system that provide  options to monitor transit cargo conveyed by road and 
rail, giving its status, location, and providing pertinent/event i nformation at a central 
location in real -time basis . 
 
The main objective of TRA’s ECTS is to effectively track movement of cargo containers 
throu gh ports, inland container  depots and custom bonded warehouses  so as to bring 
fast movement of goods along the Tanzania ’s cargo routes . TRA ECTS implementation 
benefits in reduction of dumpi ng/diversion of transit  and thus protects government 
revenue.  Techno Brain’s solution on Cargo Tracking System has been effective , reliable 
and flexible to allow easy integration of GPS/GPRS/RFID Reader technologies and 
electronic -seals/t ags of multiple manufacturers with thei r own communication 
protocols . 
 
During the implementation of the project, Techno Brain ’s highly skilled consultants 
demonstrated  excellent project management capabilities, operations and post -
implementation services through their locally available skilled engineers that has 
ensure d continuous support for the system . Techno Brain’s quality of documentation, 
on-time delivery of the project, commitment to adhere to high standards and ability 
to provide required training and skill transfer to TRA Staff were the ke y success factors 
to the successful delivery of the project.  
 
We wish Techno Brain Ltd. all the best in their future endeavors.  
 
 
 
 
 
Kenneth D. M. Wakati  
DIRECTOR FOR INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGY
